name: transferly
description: Transferly API, Telegram bot, and Telegram Mini App workspace

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix bot && npm install --prefix miniapp
scripts.test: npm test --prefix api && npm test --prefix bot
scripts.verify: npm run lint --prefix api && npm test --prefix api && npm test --prefix bot && npm run build --prefix miniapp
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && npm run check:production
